message.content: hi can you click on the 'End Session' button

content.text: Let me find the "End Session" button in the app first.
No buttons found under "Pablo". Let me check what the app is listed as.

content.text: Pablo is running (PID 53273). Let me search for all elements to find the "End Session" button.
I can see the UI elements but the buttons don't have accessibility labels exposed. Let me check the current view code to identify the right button, then click it by position.
I can see a button in the session row for "bob jones" at position (1492, 376). Let me take a screenshot to confirm it's the "End Session" button before clicking.

message.content: ok commit what we have please, and then i want you to do an accesiblity audit.   do keep in mind that our default theme is Pablo style which the UI/UX style guide mentions, but if we need to have a different UI if the colors aren't good for users with color vision difficulty, we should give an option for an alternative UI.    We do not have any accessiblity labels so that ocould be an initial start

content.content:
480d6fe docs: add recording resilience design doc and beads epic PABLO-D-118
d431fd4 feat: add Transcribe button to session rows for on-demand transcription
6bfb706 fix: clear stale awaiting-model banner when any model is available
d4e1183 feat: wire up transcript viewing, session playback, and fix model download bugs
780923e fix: suppress loading spinner on background session refreshes

content.text: The changes add an "End Session" button for stale in-progress sessions. Let me commit the code changes (excluding the local settings file) and then kick off the accessibility audit.

input.command:
git add mac/PabloCompanion/Views/ContentView.swift mac/PabloCompanion/Views/DayView.swift mac/PabloCompanion/Views/SessionRowView.swift && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add End Session button for stale in-progress sessions

Shows a red "End Session" button on session rows that are marked
in-progress but aren't the actively recording session, letting
therapists clean up stale state without leaving the day view.
EOF
)"
input.description: Commit the End Session button changes
